title: Kanban Topic names
excerpt: how do i change the Kaban names at the top of each one i want to change “working on it”   to  on-deck

posts.author: briboothe (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: how do i change the Kaban names at the top of each one i want to change “working on it” to on-deck

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @briboothe!

Welcome to the community! I hope you like it here

In this case, you would have to go to the regular board, select the value of the status column you are referring to and then click on “Add/edit labels”. You can edit them from there and you should see the changes reflected in the Kanban view.

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
-Matias
